feed.title: Bare Metal Cloud Status - Incident History

entry.title: [GRA1][Dedicated Servers] - Multiple racks maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Aug 11, 07:00 - 10:10 UTC

Jul 3, 07:07 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offer, affecting servers in racks G124B07, G124B14, G124B19, G124B21, G125B02, G125B03, G125B18, G125B21 and G125B22.

Start time : 11/08/2026 07:00 UTC
End time : 11/08/2026 10:10 UTC

List of concerned racks:
- Rack G124B07
- Rack G124B14
- Rack G124B19
- Rack G124B21
- Rack G125B02
- Rack G125B03
- Rack G125B18
- Rack G125B21
- Rack G125B22

Service impact : Public networks will be temporarily unavailable for 30 seconds during the maintenance for servers located in the specified racks.
Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will be doing a maintenance on a network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA3][Cooling System] - Rack GRA0326B03C maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 27, 06:00 - 13:00 UTC

Jun 25, 18:15 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, a maintenance is scheduled on our cooling infrastructure.

Start time : 27/07/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 27/07/2026 13:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance, the servers in the affected rack will be gracefully shut down beforehand. Customers hosted on these servers should expect a planned service interruption for the duration of the maintenance window.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA2][Dedicated Servers] - Rack G233B07 Migration Notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 16, 04:00 - 06:00 UTC

Jul 2, 14:27 UTC

Start time : 16/07/2026 04:00 UTC
End time : 16/07/2026 06:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers in rack G233B07 will be unavailable during maintenance for 2 hours.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a migration on our infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [YYZ][Dedicated Servers] - Room YYZ0101 maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 8, 12:30 - 13:30 UTC

Jun 22, 16:28 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offering, affecting servers in racks listed below :
- Rack YYZ0101B02A
- Rack YYZ0101B02A


Start time : 08/07/2026 12:30 UTC
End time : 08/07/2026 13:30 UTC
Service impact : Customers who have not configured the LACP service may temporarily experience a service interruption.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy for our network infrastructure, we will be upgrading multiple network devices to enhance security and reliability.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA1][Cooling System] - Rack G108B08 maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 8, 06:00 - 14:30 UTC

Jul 6, 09:41 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Start time : 08/07/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 08/07/2026 14:30 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance, the cooling system's efficiency may be temporarily reduced for some servers, potentially lowering performance. Despite ongoing mitigation efforts, customers could still experience a temporary reboot or shutdown in the worst case.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy for our network infrastructure, we will be upgrading multiple network devices to enhance security and reliability.

entry.title: [GRA3][Dedicated Servers] - Racks GRA0320A02A/B/C incident notification
entry.content:
Jul 6, 09:10 UTC
Update - Ongoing Actions : Our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 6, 07:39 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering in the specified racks.
The root cause has been identified.

Please find the details of this incident below :
Start time : 06/07/2026 07:09 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : All servers in the racks GRA0320A02A/B/C are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified racks.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a cooling system issue.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are actively working to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA2][Dedicated Servers] - Rack G251A09 incident notification
entry.content:
Jul 6, 07:14 UTC
Resolved - We would like to inform you that an incident occurred in the rack G251A09.
This incident has now been resolved.

Please find the details of this incident below :
Start time : 06/07/2026 06:49 UTC
End time : 06/07/2026 07:10 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : All servers in the rack G251A09 were temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers were temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified rack.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by an electrical equipment issue.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.

entry.title: [GRA1][Dedicated Servers] - G117A16 / G117A15 / G117A14 Incident notification
entry.content:
Jul 5, 18:53 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering has been resolved.

Start time : 05/07/2026 08:00 UTC
End time : 05/07/2026 18:26 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a cooling system issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 5, 16:48 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : Servers in racks G117A16 and G117A14 are now operational.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 5, 10:22 UTC
Identified - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : The cause of the incident has been identified and fixed, and our teams are now working to repair the servers that were affected.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a cooling system issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 5, 09:19 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering, which is causing temporary availability issue in G117A16 / G117A15 / G117A14 racks.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 05/07/2026 08:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some servers in the racks G117A16 / G117A15 / G117A14 are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Some customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified rack.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [RBX8][Dedicated Servers] - Rack R805R01 Incident Notification
entry.content:
Jul 5, 12:53 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our offering has been resolved.

Start time : 05/07/2026 10:36 UTC
End time : 05/07/2026 12:42 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by an electrical equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 5, 11:36 UTC
Identified - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : Most of the servers are now back online. The team is working to fix the remaining servers that are still affected.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

Jul 5, 10:52 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering, which is causing temporary availability issue in the rack R805R01.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 05/07/2026 10:36 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : All servers in the rack R805R01 are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified racks.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA1][Dedicated Servers] - G107A10 / G107A09 / G107A08 incident notification
entry.content:

Jul 5, 07:12 UTC

Update : Our teams have identified the cause of the incident and are currently bringing the servers back online.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by an electrical equipment issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 5, 06:57 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering, which is causing temporary availability issue in racks G107A10 / G107A09 / G107A08.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 05/07/2026 06:23 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : All servers in racks G107A10 / G107A09 / G107A08 are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified rack.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.
